title: Manage Git Workflow
description: Handle git state, commits, version bumps, branches, and release hygiene while preserving user work. Use for status, diffs, commits, tags, PR prep, and pre-commit setup.
body: Inspect status before touching git state. Preserve user edits. You are not alone in the codebase: pre-existing unexplained changes are user-owned and must not be reverted, reformatted, overwritten, moved, deleted, or staged without explicit user permission. Reset, delete, stash, rebase, and push require explicit request. Commit messages follow Conventional Commits 1.0.0, state why, and include required trailers.
